# PHProjectTextElement.ElementType

**Enumeration**

An enumeration of the type of text element.

## Declaration

```swift
enum ElementType
```

## Types of Text Elements

- **PHProjectTextElement.ElementType.body**: An enumeration to denote body text.
- **PHProjectTextElement.ElementType.title**: An enumeration to denote title text in the header view.
- **PHProjectTextElement.ElementType.subtitle**: An enumeration to denote subtitle text in the header view.

## Initializers

- **init(rawValue:)**

## Describing a Text Element

- **text**: The raw unformatted string for the text element.
- **attributedText**: The stylized attributed string for the text element as presented to the user in Photos.
- **textElementType**: The enumerated type of the text element.

## Conforms To

- BitwiseCopyable
- Equatable
- Hashable
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
